name: Theo - t3.gg
oneLine: Opinionated TypeScript YouTuber and founder of Ping Labs who created the T3 Stack and runs T3 Chat.
bio: Theo Browne is the CEO of Ping Labs (Y Combinator) and a TypeScript-focused YouTuber and streamer. He created the T3 Stack and create-t3-app (Next.js + tRPC + Prisma + Tailwind), Uploadthing, Ping.gg, and the T3 Chat AI client. His channel mixes hot-take reactions to web dev news, deep TypeScript and React commentary, and product-building vlogs, drawing roughly 4M views per month.
style: Reaction and commentary videos plus long-form Twitch streams reposted to YouTube, often built around screenshotted tweets and live code reading.
